positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~binge(X0) | download(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~binge(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | share(X0)).

    ~popular(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | binge(X0)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    ~download(X0) | binge(X0) | ~netflix_show(X0)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    share(stranger_things)).

cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    ~share(black_mirror)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    stranger_things != black_mirror).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    popular(stranger_things)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    netflix_show(stranger_things)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    binge(stranger_things)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~download(black_mirror)).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    download(stranger_things)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
